headline: Here's How Much You'd Have If You Invested $1000 in Cintas a Decade Ago
summary: Investing in certain stocks can pay off in the long run, especially if you hold on for a decade or more.

headline: Insider Move: Melanie W Barstad Exercises Options, Realizing $1.82M At Cintas
summary:
A large exercise of company stock options by Melanie W Barstad, Board Member at Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) was disclosed in a new SEC filing on July 20, as part of an insider exercise.
